top_signals.title: US Futures Rally With All Eyes on SpaceX, Iran War Peace Hopes
top_signals.summary: US futures climbed ahead of the open on Friday, propelled by optimism about pending trading in SpaceX, which made history with the biggest-ever IPO, and the potential for an interim peace deal in the Iran conflict.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK data suggests demand weakness leads inflation risks for BoE rate-setters
top_signals.summary: Consumers expect prices to rise in the coming months but businesses appear more hesitant given weak demand
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump vows to seize Iran’s Kharg Island
top_signals.summary: Kharg Island, the linchpin of Iran’s oil industry, has once more come under focus amid a fraying ceasefire.

top_signals.title: Gorgeous has a great chance of Victory at Sha Tin
top_signals.summary: TRAINER Danny Shum has called upon his friend and ally Zac Purton to kick-start his trainers’ championship challenge again. It was only a few weeks back that Shum was carrying all before him, with winners galore – Romantic Warrior completing the Triple Crown and leading the trainers’ title race. That has come to a juddering [...]

top_signals.title: Blackstone Said to Be in Talks to Buy Canada Property Firm H&R REIT
top_signals.summary: Blackstone Inc. is in early-stage talks about an acquisition involving H&R Real Estate Investment Trust, a Canadian owner of apartment buildings and other properties.

top_signals.title: AngloGold Ashanti Announces Date for General Meeting of Shareholders in Relation to Proposed Share Repurchase Programme
top_signals.summary: As previously announced on 8 May 2026, the Board of Directors of AngloGold Ashanti plc (“AngloGold Ashanti”, “AGA” or the “Company”) (NYSE: AU; JSE: ANG) approved, on 7 May 2026, a proposed share repurchase programme for the Company’s ordinary shares of up to $2.0bn. The implementation of the proposed share repurchase programme is, among other [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Newnham’s Resolve can keep him in championship race
top_signals.summary: HONG Kong racegoers arriving for an 11-race programme, including a couple of contests on the all-weather surface at Sha Tin on Saturday, will need to be armed with their umbrellas again. Rain and possible thunderstorms are forecast to hit the city over the weekend, resulting in probable testing conditions for gallopers on show during the [...]
